title: Totem of Undying Death Messages
description: Datapack that adds unique death messages to cheated deaths via Totem of Undying
body:
# ![Totem of Undying Death Messages for Minecraft: Java Edition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/331e63a14a09463fd25594a84fca02635b56a57e.png)
*quality of life datapack that adds messages to totems for servers who use them too much.*

A Datapack for Minecraft 1.20.2 and Higher for servers that pop totems more than a person can breathe.

Adds 30+ unique death messages for when you die with a totem on hand!

# Why ToUDM?
1. This idea has been a suggestion for YEARS:
https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/5hr3lr/totems_of_undying_should_put_an_almost_death/
https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/rs6m6j/getting_revived_by_a_totem_shows_a_death_message/
https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/360071582392-Messages-when-Totem-of-Undying-is-used

2. It's a remedy to the mass amounts of totems that are used in modern Minecraft PVP, causing a lack of death messages in chat (sad!).
This is so you can see your friend's skill issues in your server, and everyone in the server can laugh at them!

3. it's very funny, trust me. you'll get used to it.

# Messages
- "[Player] died but came back to life thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] got poked to death by a sweet berry bush but got the thorns off thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] went out with a bang but continued with the show thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] blew up but stayed intact thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] suffocated in a wall but got out thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was squashed by a falling block but unflattened thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was pummeled but came out fine thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] died to thorns but came back to life thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was pricked to death but decided to stop being poked thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] experienced kinetic energy but it was converted back to potential energy thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] froze to death but kept themselves warm using [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was stung to death but it didn't pinch thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] withered away but didn't wither thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] discovered the floor was lava but didn't care because of [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was squished too much but hung in there thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was squashed by a falling anvil but got unsquished thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] drowned but swam further thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was skewered by a falling stalactite but was unskewered thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] left the confines of this world but was brought back into the world thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] starved to death but ate [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] swam in lava with the help of [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was burnt to death but cooled down thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] went up in flames but cooled down thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was killed by [Intentional Game Design] but survived unintentionally thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was struck by lightning but absorbed it thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was obliterated by a sonically-charged shriek but got reconstructed thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was killed by magic but the magic was nullified thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was impaled on a stalagmite but un-impaled thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] fell from a high place but landed safely thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] was shot to death but came back to life thanks to [Totem Of Undying]"
- "[Player] hit the ground too hard but got back up thanks to [Totem of Undying]" (ender pearl)
- "[Player] was smashed by a mace but got the weight off thanks to [Totem of Undying]"
- "[Player] was speared but felt nothing thanks to [Totem of Undying]"
- "[Player] died because not just the floor is lava but bounced back thanks to [Totem of Undying]"

**Mod Icon by n_bonnie2 (using chat report texture and totem of undying)**

# Translations
- American English [by n_bonnie2, fallback]
- Russian (Русский) - [by chifir4ik, Resource Pack Only]
- Chinese (中文) - [by edeipici2026, Resource Pack Only]

If you want to supply tranlations for this datapack, let me know on my discord! (n_bonnie2)

This Datapack will only be maintained for the latest version/snapshots.
